BeerVolta.rule: - **Shop Rule (BeerVolta)**: Two formats exist. **NEW format**: `Japanese Brewery Name : Japanese Beer Name | English Brewery Name: English Beer Name` — the pipe `|` separates Japanese and English portions, and the colon `:` separates brewery name from beer name within each portion. **OLD format**: `Japanese Name / English Brewery Name English Beer Name [Optional Size/Info]` — a slash `/` separates the Japanese and English portions, and the English part starts with the brewery name followed by the beer name. In both formats, suffixes like bottle/can size (e.g., '500ml', '355ml'), shipping info (e.g., '【空輸】'), and arrival dates (e.g., '≪12/20-21入荷予定≫') should be ignored. Always prioritize extracting brewery and beer names from the English portion. DO NOT hallucinate or guess collab breweries if they are not explicitly written in the text.
BeerVolta.examples:
1. (NEW) "パシフィックブルーイング : デーモンワーク | Passific: Demon Work" -> {"brewery_name_jp": "パシフィックブルーイング", "brewery_name_en": "Pacific Brewing", "beer_name_jp": "デーモンワーク", "beer_name_en": "Demon Work", "beer_name_core": "Demon Work", "search_hint": "Demon Work Pacific Brewing"}
2. (NEW) "トップリンゴライアス : モーニングディライト | Toppling Goliath: Mornin' Delight 【空輸】" -> {"brewery_name_jp": "トップリンゴライアス", "brewery_name_en": "Toppling Goliath", "beer_name_jp": "モーニングディライト", "beer_name_en": "Mornin' Delight", "beer_name_core": "Mornin' Delight", "search_hint": "Mornin' Delight Toppling Goliath"}

BEER VOLTA.rule: - **Shop Rule (BeerVolta)**: Two formats exist. **NEW format**: `Japanese Brewery Name : Japanese Beer Name | English Brewery Name: English Beer Name` — the pipe `|` separates Japanese and English portions, and the colon `:` separates brewery name from beer name within each portion. Always prioritize extracting brewery and beer names from the English portion.
BEER VOLTA.examples: 1. "パシフィックブルーイング : デーモンワーク | Passific: Demon Work" -> {"brewery_name_jp": "パシフィックブルーイング", "brewery_name_en": "Pacific Brewing", "beer_name_jp": "デーモンワーク", "beer_name_en": "Demon Work", "beer_name_core": "Demon Work", "search_hint": "Demon Work Pacific Brewing"}

Chouseiya.rule: - **Shop Rule (Chouseiya / ちょうせいや)**: The STRICT format is `【Beer Name / Brewery Name】`. IMPORTANT: The content BEFORE the slash (/) inside 【】 is ALWAYS the Beer Name, and the content AFTER the slash is ALWAYS the Brewery Name. Prefixes outside 【】 (e.g., discount rates '30%OFF', 'ポイント10倍') and suffixes (e.g., '(賞味期限/2025.11.15)') must be IGNORED. For collab breweries with × or x, include all brewery names (e.g., '京都醸造×Inkhorn' → 'Kyoto Brewing x Inkhorn Brewing'). Assume all products are "beer" unless explicitly stated otherwise.
Chouseiya.examples:
1. "【Brown Saison/ヨロッコ】" -> {"brewery_name_jp": "ヨロッコ", "brewery_name_en": "Yorocco Beer", "beer_name_en": "Brown Saison", "beer_name_core": "Brown Saison", "search_hint": "Brown Saison Yorocco", "product_type": "beer"}
2. "【BATON 005(インペリアルスタウト＋青山椒)375ml/箕面ビール】" -> {"brewery_name_jp": "箕面ビール", "brewery_name_en": "Minoh Beer", "beer_name_jp": "BATON 005", "beer_name_en": "BATON 005", "beer_name_core": "BATON 005", "search_hint": "BATON 005 Minoh Beer", "product_type": "beer"}

ちょうせいや.rule: - **Shop Rule (Chouseiya / ちょうせいや)**: The STRICT format is `【Beer Name / Brewery Name】`. IMPORTANT: The content BEFORE the slash (/) inside 【】 is ALWAYS the Beer Name, and the content AFTER the slash is ALWAYS the Brewery Name.
ちょうせいや.examples: 1. "【Brown Saison/ヨロッコ】" -> {"brewery_name_jp": "ヨロッコ", "brewery_name_en": "Yorocco Beer", "beer_name_en": "Brown Saison", "beer_name_core": "Brown Saison", "search_hint": "Brown Saison Yorocco", "product_type": "beer"}

Ichigo Ichie.rule: - **Shop Rule (Ichigo Ichie / 一期一会～る)**: The format commonly includes both Japanese and English names: `Brewery (JP) Beer (JP) (Brewery EN Beer EN)`. Extract brewery and beer names from the clearest available portion (typically English inside parentheses). When an English brewery and English beer name are adjacent without a separator inside parentheses (e.g., 'Everywhere Brewing Everything Always'), carefully split them so that the brewery portion is separate from the beer name. DO NOT use 'Ichigo Ichie' as the brewery name.
Ichigo Ichie.examples:
1. "ニーディープ ディープヘイズ（KNEE DEEP Deep Haze）" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Knee Deep Brewing", "beer_name_en": "Deep Haze"}
2. "エブリウェアー エブリシングオールウェイズ（Everywhere Brewing Everything Always）" -> {"brewery_name_jp": "エブリウェアー", "brewery_name_en": "Everywhere Brewing", "beer_name_jp": "エブリシングオールウェイズ", "beer_name_en": "Everything Always"}

一期一会～る.rule: - **Shop Rule (Ichigo Ichie / 一期一会～る)**: The format commonly includes both Japanese and English names: `Brewery (JP) Beer (JP) (Brewery EN Beer EN)`. Extract brewery and beer names from the clearest available portion (typically English inside parentheses).
一期一会～る.examples: 1. "ニーディープ ディープヘイズ（KNEE DEEP Deep Haze）" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Knee Deep Brewing", "beer_name_en": "Deep Haze"}

Arôme.rule: - **Shop Rule (Arôme / アローム)**: The format is typically `Japanese Brewery / Japanese Beer Name (Beer Style) [English Brewery / English Beer Name]`. The first part before the slash is the brewery (Japanese), the second part is the beer name (Japanese). The English version in square brackets `[...]` provides the definitive brewery and beer names separated by `/`. Prioritize extracting from the English portion in square brackets when available.
Arôme.examples:
1. "トパトパ / ハックスター (Double IPA) [Topa Topa Brewing / Huckster]" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Topa Topa Brewing", "beer_name_en": "Huckster"}
2. "パリシュ / サイレンサー (IPA) [Parish Brewing / Sil3ncer]" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Parish Brewing", "beer_name_en": "Sil3ncer"}

アローム.rule: - **Shop Rule (Arôme / アローム)**: The format is typically `Japanese Brewery / Japanese Beer Name (Beer Style) [English Brewery / English Beer Name]`. Prioritize extracting from the English portion in square brackets when available.
アローム.examples: 1. "トパトパ / ハックスター (Double IPA) [Topa Topa Brewing / Huckster]" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Topa Topa Brewing", "beer_name_en": "Huckster"}

Maruho.rule: - **Shop Rule (Maruho / マルホ酒店)**: The format is typically `English Beer Name [Volume e.g. 473ml or 330ml]/Brewery Name` or `English Beer Name [Collab info] [Volume]/Brewery Name`. The portion BEFORE the volume (ml) and slash `/` is the Beer Name, and the portion AFTER the slash `/` is ALWAYS the Brewery Name. Suffixes or vendor information should be mapped to brewery_name_en or brewery_name_jp.
Maruho.examples:
1. "Arid Grit Hazy DIPA 473ml/Hop Butcher" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Hop Butcher For The World", "beer_name_en": "Arid Grit Hazy DIPA", "beer_name_core": "Arid Grit", "search_hint": "Arid Grit Hop Butcher"}
2. "Rock Weizen 330ml/八ヶ岳ブルワリー" -> {"brewery_name_jp": "八ヶ岳ブルワリー", "brewery_name_en": "Yatsugatake Brewery", "beer_name_en": "Rock Weizen", "beer_name_core": "Rock Weizen", "search_hint": "Rock Weizen Yatsugatake"}

マルホ酒店.rule: - **Shop Rule (Maruho / マルホ酒店)**: The format is typically `English Beer Name [Volume e.g. 473ml or 330ml]/Brewery Name`. The portion BEFORE the slash is the Beer Name, and the portion AFTER the slash is the Brewery Name.
マルホ酒店.examples: 1. "Arid Grit Hazy DIPA 473ml/Hop Butcher" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Hop Butcher For The World", "beer_name_en": "Arid Grit Hazy DIPA", "beer_name_core": "Arid Grit", "search_hint": "Arid Grit Hop Butcher"}

Antenna America.rule: - **Shop Rule (Antenna America / アンテナアメリカ)**: The format is typically `English Brewery Name English Beer Name (Volume e.g. 473ml) / Japanese Katakana Reading 【Shipping Date e.g. 7/2出荷】`. The portion BEFORE the parentheses and slash `/` contains the English Brewery Name followed by the English Beer Name. Suffixes inside parentheses `(...)` or brackets `【...】` like volume or shipping schedule must be IGNORED. DO NOT include shipping dates in beer names.
Antenna America.examples:
1. "Revision There Are No Good Endings (473ml) / ゼア アー ノー グッド エンディングズ【7/2出荷】" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Revision Brewing Company", "beer_name_en": "There Are No Good Endings", "beer_name_core": "There Are No Good Endings", "search_hint": "There Are No Good Endings Revision"}
2. "49th State Brewing Spruceplosion (473ml) / スプルースプロージョン【7/2出荷】" -> {"brewery_name_en": "49th State Brewing", "beer_name_en": "Spruceplosion", "beer_name_core": "Spruceplosion", "search_hint": "Spruceplosion 49th State Brewing"}

アンテナアメリカ.rule: - **Shop Rule (Antenna America / アンテナアメリカ)**: The format is typically `English Brewery Name English Beer Name (Volume e.g. 473ml) / Japanese Katakana Reading 【Shipping Date】`. Extract English Brewery and Beer Name from the portion before the slash.
アンテナアメリカ.examples: 1. "Revision There Are No Good Endings (473ml) / ゼア アー ノー グッド エンディングズ【7/2出荷】" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Revision Brewing Company", "beer_name_en": "There Are No Good Endings", "beer_name_core": "There Are No Good Endings", "search_hint": "There Are No Good Endings Revision"}
